nrf54_ble_init.tooltip: Initialize nRF54 BLE radio with specified TX power

nrf54_ble_get_address.tooltip: Get current BLE device address string

nrf54_ble_set_adv_data_raw.message0: Set advertising data Flags %1 include name %2

nrf54_ble_set_scan_response_name.tooltip: Set device name in BLE scan response

nrf54_ble_advertise_once.tooltip: Send one advertising event on all three primary channels

nrf54_ble_advertise_connectable.tooltip: Send connectable advertising and listen for connection requests

nrf54_ble_is_connected.tooltip: Check if BLE connection is established

nrf54_ble_poll_event.tooltip: Wait for and process a BLE connection event

nrf54_ble_set_gatt_device_name.tooltip: Set GATT standard device name characteristic

nrf54_ble_clear_gatt.tooltip: Clear custom GATT service table, must be called before adding services

nrf54_ble_add_service_16.tooltip: Add a 16-bit UUID custom GATT service

nrf54_ble_add_service_128.tooltip: Add a 128-bit UUID custom GATT service

nrf54_ble_add_characteristic.message0: In service %1 add characteristic %2 UUID(16-bit) %3 properties %4
nrf54_ble_add_characteristic.tooltip: Add a characteristic under the specified service

nrf54_ble_notify_char.tooltip: Send characteristic value change notification to connected central

nrf54_ble_is_cccd_enabled.tooltip: Check if central has enabled notifications for this characteristic

nrf54_ble_on_char_write.tooltip: Execute when characteristic is written by central

nrf54_ble_char_write_value.tooltip: Get last written characteristic value data

nrf54_ble_nus_init.message0: Initialize BLE Nordic UART Service name %1
nrf54_ble_nus_init.tooltip: Initialize BLE and Nordic UART Service (NUS) with advertising name

nrf54_ble_nus_available.tooltip: Return number of bytes available in NUS receive buffer

nrf54_ble_nus_read_string.tooltip: Read all available data from NUS receive buffer as string

nrf54_ble_nus_write.tooltip: Send string data to central via NUS

nrf54_ble_nus_println.tooltip: Send string data with newline via NUS

nrf54_ble_nus_connected.tooltip: Check if NUS Bluetooth connection is established

nrf54_ble_nus_service.tooltip: Call in loop to process NUS send/receive and connection events

nrf54_ble_scan_passive.tooltip: Passively scan nearby BLE advertisements, returns whether received

nrf54_ble_scan_active.tooltip: Actively scan nearby BLE devices, returns whether scanned

nrf54_ble_scan_get_address.tooltip: Get address of most recently scanned device

nrf54_ble_scan_get_rssi.tooltip: Get signal strength of most recently scanned device (dBm)

nrf54_ble_scan_get_name.tooltip: Parse device name from scan result advertising data

nrf54_ble_peripheral_quick.message0: Quick BLE peripheral name %1 %2 when data received %3
nrf54_ble_peripheral_quick.tooltip: One-click initialize BLE NUS peripheral, execute code block on receive

nrf54_ble_peripheral_received_data.tooltip: Get data string received via BLE

nrf54_ble_peripheral_send.tooltip: Send data to central via BLE

nrf54_ble_peripheral_connected.tooltip: Check if quick BLE peripheral is connected

nrf54_ble_power_low_power_mode.tooltip: Set CPU to low power latency mode
